  7→package kotlinx.datetime
  8→
  9→import kotlinx.datetime.format.*
 10→import kotlinx.datetime.internal.safeMultiply
 11→import kotlinx.datetime.internal.*
 12→import kotlinx.datetime.serializers.InstantIso8601Serializer
 13→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
 14→import java.time.DateTimeException
 15→import java.time.format.DateTimeParseException
 16→import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit
 17→import kotlin.time.*
 18→import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.nanoseconds
 19→import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.seconds
 20→import java.time.Instant as jtInstant
 21→import java.time.Clock as jtClock
 22→
 23→@Serializable(with = InstantIso8601Serializer::class)
 24→public actual class Instant internal constructor(internal val value: jtInstant) : Comparable<Instant> {
 25→
 26→    public actual val epochSeconds: Long
 27→        get() = value.epochSecond
 28→    public actual val nanosecondsOfSecond: Int
 29→        get() = value.nano
 30→
 31→    public actual fun toEpochMilliseconds(): Long = try {
 32→        value.toEpochMilli()
 33→    } catch (e: ArithmeticException) {
 34→        if (value.isAfter(java.time.Instant.EPOCH)) Long.MAX_VALUE else Long.MIN_VALUE
 35→    }
 36→
 37→    public actual operator fun plus(duration: Duration): Instant = duration.toComponents { seconds, nanoseconds ->
 38→        try {
 39→            Instant(value.plusSeconds(seconds).plusNanos(nanoseconds.toLong()))
 40→        } catch (e: java.lang.Exception) {
 41→            if (e !is ArithmeticException && e !is DateTimeException) throw e
 42→            if (duration.isPositive()) MAX else MIN
 43→        }
 44→    }
 45→
 46→    public actual operator fun minus(duration: Duration): Instant = plus(-duration)
 47→
 48→    public actual operator fun minus(other: Instant): Duration =
 49→        (this.value.epochSecond - other.value.epochSecond).seconds + // won't overflow given the instant bounds
 50→            (this.value.nano - other.value.nano).nanoseconds
 51→
 52→    public actual override operator fun compareTo(other: Instant): Int = this.value.compareTo(other.value)
 53→
 54→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
 55→            (this === other) || (other is Instant && this.value == other.value)
 56→
 57→    override fun hashCode(): Int = value.hashCode()
 58→
 59→    actual override fun toString(): String = value.toString()
 60→
 61→    public actual companion object {
 62→        @Deprecated("Use Clock.System.now() instead", ReplaceWith("Clock.System.now()", "kotlinx.datetime.Clock"), level = DeprecationLevel.ERROR)
 63→        public actual fun now(): Instant =
 64→                Instant(jtClock.systemUTC().instant())
 65→
 66→        public actual fun fromEpochMilliseconds(epochMilliseconds: Long): Instant =
 67→                Instant(jtInstant.ofEpochMilli(epochMilliseconds))
 68→
 69→        public actual fun parse(input: CharSequence, format: DateTimeFormat<DateTimeComponents>): Instant = try {
 70→            format.parse(input).toInstantUsingOffset()
 71→        } catch (e: IllegalArgumentException) {
 72→            throw DateTimeFormatException("Failed to parse an instant from '$input'", e)
 73→        }
 74→
 75→        @Deprecated("This overload is only kept for binary compatibility", level = DeprecationLevel.HIDDEN)
 76→        public fun parse(isoString: String): Instant = parse(input = isoString)
 77→
 78→public actual fun fromEpochSeconds(epochSeconds: Long, nanosecondAdjustment: Long): Instant = try {
 79→            Instant(jtInstant.ofEpochSecond(epochSeconds, nanosecondAdjustment))
 80→        } catch (e: Exception) {
 81→            if (e !is ArithmeticException && e !is DateTimeException) throw e
 82→            if (epochSeconds > 0) MAX else MIN
 83→        }
 84→
 85→        public actual fun fromEpochSeconds(epochSeconds: Long, nanosecondAdjustment: Int): Instant =
 86→            fromEpochSeconds(epochSeconds, nanosecondAdjustment.toLong())
 87→
 88→        public actual val DISTANT_PAST: Instant = Instant(jtInstant.ofEpochSecond(DISTANT_PAST_SECONDS, 999_999_999))
 89→        public actual val DISTANT_FUTURE: Instant = Instant(jtInstant.ofEpochSecond(DISTANT_FUTURE_SECONDS, 0))
 90→
 91→        internal actual val MIN: Instant = Instant(jtInstant.MIN)
 92→        internal actual val MAX: Instant = Instant(jtInstant.MAX)
 93→    }
 94→}
 95→
 96→private fun Instant.atZone(zone: TimeZone): java.time.ZonedDateTime = try {
 97→    value.atZone(zone.zoneId)
 98→} catch (e: DateTimeException) {
 99→    throw DateTimeArithmeticException(e)
100→}
101→
102→public actual fun Instant.plus(period: DateTimePeriod, timeZone: TimeZone): Instant {
103→    try {
104→        val thisZdt = atZone(timeZone)
105→        return with(period) {
106→            thisZdt
107→                    .run { if (totalMonths != 0) plusMonths(totalMonths.toLong()) else this }
108→                    .run { if (days != 0) plusDays(days.toLong()) else this }
109→                    .run { if (totalNanoseconds != 0L) plusNanos(totalNanoseconds) else this }
110→        }.toInstant().let(::Instant)
111→    } catch (e: DateTimeException) {
112→        throw DateTimeArithmeticException(e)
113→    }
114→}
115→
116→@Deprecated("Use the plus overload with an explicit number of units", ReplaceWith("this.plus(1, unit, timeZone)"))
117→public actual fun Instant.plus(unit: DateTimeUnit, timeZone: TimeZone): Instant =
118→        plus(1L, unit, timeZone)
119→
120→public actual fun Instant.plus(value: Int, unit: DateTimeUnit, timeZone: TimeZone): Instant =
121→        plus(value.toLong(), unit, timeZone)
122→
123→public actual fun Instant.minus(value: Int, unit: DateTimeUnit, timeZone: TimeZone): Instant =
124→        plus(-value.toLong(), unit, timeZone)
125→
126→public actual fun Instant.plus(value: Long, unit: DateTimeUnit, timeZone: TimeZone): Instant =
127→        try {
128→            val thisZdt = atZone(timeZone)
129→            when (unit) {
130→                is DateTimeUnit.TimeBased ->
131→                    plus(value, unit).value.also { it.atZone(timeZone.zoneId) }
132→                is DateTimeUnit.DayBased ->
133→                    thisZdt.plusDays(safeMultiply(value, unit.days.toLong())).toInstant()
134→                is DateTimeUnit.MonthBased ->
135→                    thisZdt.plusMonths(safeMultiply(value, unit.months.toLong())).toInstant()
136→            }.let(::Instant)
137→        } catch (e: Exception) {
138→            if (e !is DateTimeException && e !is ArithmeticException) throw e
139→            throw DateTimeArithmeticException("Instant $this cannot be represented as local date when adding $value $unit to it", e)
140→        }
141→
142→public actual fun Instant.plus(value: Long, unit: DateTimeUnit.TimeBased): Instant =
143→    try {
144→        multiplyAndDivide(value, unit.nanoseconds, NANOS_PER_ONE.toLong()).let { (d, r) ->
145→            Instant(this.value.plusSeconds(d).plusNanos(r))
146→        }
147→    } catch (e: Exception) {
148→        if (e !is DateTimeException && e !is ArithmeticException) throw e
149→        if (value > 0) Instant.MAX else Instant.MIN
150→    }
151→
152→public actual fun Instant.periodUntil(other: Instant, timeZone: TimeZone): DateTimePeriod {
153→    var thisZdt = this.atZone(timeZone)
154→    val otherZdt = other.atZone(timeZone)
155→
156→    val months = thisZdt.until(otherZdt, ChronoUnit.MONTHS); thisZdt = thisZdt.plusMonths(months)
157→    val days = thisZdt.until(otherZdt, ChronoUnit.DAYS); thisZdt = thisZdt.plusDays(days)
158→    val nanoseconds = thisZdt.until(otherZdt, ChronoUnit.NANOS)
159→
160→    if (months > Int.MAX_VALUE || months < Int.MIN_VALUE) {
161→        throw DateTimeArithmeticException("The number of months between $this and $other does not fit in an Int")
162→    }
163→    return buildDateTimePeriod(months.toInt(), days.toInt(), nanoseconds)
164→}
165→
166→public actual fun Instant.until(other: Instant, unit: DateTimeUnit, timeZone: TimeZone): Long = try {
167→    val thisZdt = this.atZone(timeZone)
168→    val otherZdt = other.atZone(timeZone)
169→    when(unit) {
170→        is DateTimeUnit.TimeBased -> until(other, unit)
171→        is DateTimeUnit.DayBased -> thisZdt.until(otherZdt, ChronoUnit.DAYS) / unit.days
172→        is DateTimeUnit.MonthBased -> thisZdt.until(otherZdt, ChronoUnit.MONTHS) / unit.months
173→    }
174→} catch (e: DateTimeException) {
175→    throw DateTimeArithmeticException(e)
176→} catch (e: ArithmeticException) {
177→    if (this.value < other.value) Long.MAX_VALUE else Long.MIN_VALUE
178→}
